minimum_definitions.exact_duplicate: Normalized text strings are identical after lowercasing and whitespace collapse.
minimum_definitions.near_duplicate: TF-IDF cosine similarity is at least near_duplicate_cosine_threshold and the examples are not exact duplicates.
minimum_definitions.leakage: A held-out example is exact or near-duplicate of a training example, or metadata directly exposes the label or split.
minimum_definitions.label_error: At least two independent signals disagree with the assigned label.
minimum_definitions.shortcut: A shallow model using only derived text or row-order features reaches shortcut_warning_accuracy or explains many errors.
minimum_definitions.ambiguous: The example plausibly admits more than one label under the annotation guideline.
